articles.title: Two Stanford grads raise $11M to build a noninvasive wearable for hormone tracking
articles.description: Clair Health's wearable will cost $369 and will an app-based subscription of $9.99 per month

articles.title: Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart home speaker
articles.description: Google is betting generative AI can breathe new life into the smart speaker. The company's new $99.99 Google Home Speaker replaces the rigid commands of the Google Assistant era with more conversational Gemini interactions.

articles.title: PayPal Ventures shutters as company restructuring continues
articles.description: The corporate venture arm ends after 10 years and 80 investments.

articles.title: The slowtech revolution is here to kill your phone addiction and rescue your attention span
articles.description: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”

articles.title: Collecting robot training data is dirty, unglamorous work. Some AI labs are already paying XDOF to do it.

articles.title: Pramaana Labs raises $27M seed round from Khosla Ventures to bring formal verification to AI

articles.title: SpaceX alum nabs $22M to turn rocket engines into geothermal power plants

articles.title: Anthropic’s latest feud with the Trump admin may actually help it, sales data suggests

articles.title: Apple plans to change its Hide My Email privacy feature that could make it less effective

articles.title: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon
articles.description: SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.

articles.title: Qualcomm wants to be the chip inside whatever replaces your smartphone, and it just announced two products toward that end
articles.description: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said Tuesday that the company is working on over 40 different AI wearable devices — including jewelry, earbuds with cameras, pins, and watches — a sign of how aggressively the chipmaker is betting that the next major computing platform won't be a phone.

articles.title: Bug in FIFA World Cup internal system gave anyone ability to modify TV stream
articles.description: A security researcher said a flaw in FIFA’s online platforms allowed her to access several internal systems, including one that could have allowed her to take control of the TV stream of every World Cup match.

articles.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
articles.description: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.

articles.title: Mobileye’s US robotaxi launch will put it on both sides of the AV business
articles.description: Mobileye apparently wants to own some of the robotaxi market, even if that puts it in direct competition with companies it supplies its self-driving system to.

articles.title: Rivian cuts hundreds of workers after R2 deliveries start
articles.description: The company said the cuts were part of a restructuring meant to help scale to profitability. Rivian recently pushed back its profitability goal to invest in autonomy.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI与硬件创新**：斯坦福校友获1100万美元融资，开发非侵入式可穿戴设备用于激素追踪；谷歌押注Gemini模型，计划重塑智能音箱体验；Pinterest推出AI购物应用“Ask Pinterest”；高通发布两款芯片，瞄准替代智能手机的新一代设备。

2. **AI行业融资与工具**：Pramaana Labs获Khosla Ventures 2700万美元种子轮投资，推动AI形式验证技术；DeepL收购Mixhalo，拓展现场活动音频流与翻译服务；Anthropic与特朗普政府的冲突反促销售增长。

3. **企业重组与投资动向**：PayPal Ventures因公司重组关闭；SpaceX估值飙升至2.6万亿美元，短暂超越亚马逊；加拿大养老金巨头加入印度AI数据中心建设竞赛；SpaceX前员工获2200万美元，将火箭发动机技术用于地热发电。

4. **自动驾驶与出行服务**：Uber宣布2027年在休斯顿推出高端机器人出租车服务；特斯拉（隐含）及行业持续推动无人驾驶落地。

5. **隐私与数字健康趋势**：苹果计划修改“隐藏邮件地址”功能，可能降低其隐私保护效果；“慢科技革命”兴起，旨在减少手机成瘾、恢复用户注意力；AI训练数据采集工作被指“肮脏且不体面”，部分实验室已开始付费外包。

**总结**：今日最值得关注的发展是AI与硬件深度融合加速，从可穿戴激素追踪、智能音箱重塑到新一代芯片布局，同时SpaceX估值突破2.6万亿美元，凸显科技巨头在AI、太空和新能源领域的激烈竞争与资本集中。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **多模态与机器人技术进展**：Hugging Face发布多项前沿研究，包括语言引导的3D运动预测模型MolmoMotion、从模型库到机器人硬件的Strands Agents与LeRobot集成方案，以及面向长周期任务的GLM-5.2模型。
2. **AI在医疗与能源领域的应用**：Google AI展示其医疗AI系统AMIE在健康管理中的潜力，并宣布在美国阿拉巴马州和弗吉尼亚州的新投资，聚焦社区支持、本地就业与能源可负担性。
3. **模型行为预测与开放生态建设**：OpenAI通过模拟部署预测模型发布前行为，推出合作伙伴网络及面向未来工作的学院课程，并展示Preply结合AI与真人教师的个性化学习案例、BBVA将AI融入银行业务，以及利用Codex模拟黑洞的天体物理学应用。

今日最值得关注的发展是：OpenAI与Hugging Face分别从模型行为预测、开放生态合作及多模态机器人控制等方向，加速AI从研究到实际部署的落地进程。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中菲日海洋划界争议**：中方专家批评菲律宾外长声称日菲海洋划界“与中国无关”的言论，指出此举暗藏超出双边范围的别有用意。
2. **中国科研诚信风波**：“学生耿”事件引发对中国学术不端问题的关注，涉及对资深学者的指控，推动科研诚信讨论。
3. **国际对比与外交动态**：英国因社交媒体言论逮捕人数超过中俄土三国总和；美国暂缓将中国DeepSeek及百余家企业列入黑名单，但认定其构成安全风险；美国对华军事技术出口管控出现争议，如美制军用电视墙制造商已售予中方。
4. **中美科技与贸易摩擦**：美国拟限制中国产汽车智能技术，福特等公司需申请许可；中国禁止销售德国英飞凌氮化镓芯片；美国担忧中国对磷化铟出口管制影响AI数据中心建设。
5. **中国经济与能源转型**：中国通过减少石油进口支撑全球经济；菲律宾成为中国第二大太阳能板市场；中国加大对大型核反应堆的投入；高考改革持续推进；SpaceX模式激发中国IPO雄心，但技术差距仍存。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中方严正驳斥菲律宾借日菲海洋划界暗藏地缘政治意图，同时中美在科技、贸易领域博弈加剧，凸显中国在维护主权与推动自主创新上的坚定立场。
